moduleTitle: Applications, Discontinuities, and VT to Specific Procedures

lessons.title: Materials and Discontinuities: Employer-Defined Applications
objectives: Distinguish inherent, processing, and service-induced discontinuities
Describe visual testing applications for mineral-based, metallic, and organic-based materials
Recognize typical weld discontinuities visible at the surface
cp105Topics: 5.0 Employer-defined applications: inherent, processing, and service-induced discontinuities

lessons.title: Performing VT to a Procedure: Parameters and Standardization
objectives: Identify inspection objectives, checkpoints, sampling plans, and inspection patterns from a documented procedure
Explain the purpose of test standards and standardization in visual testing
Follow a written VT procedure step by step

lessons.title: Classifying Indications and Documenting Results
objectives: Classify indications against given acceptance criteria
Complete a basic visual testing report with required documentation
Explain why complete and accurate records are essential
cp105Topics: 6.3 Classification of indications per acceptance criteria
